Findings.Title: S3 buckets should require requests to use Secure Socket Layer
Findings.Description: This control checks whether S3 buckets have policies that require requests to use SSL/TLS. Buckets without this policy can be accessed over plain HTTP.

Recommendation.Text: Attach a bucket policy that denies any s3 action when aws:SecureTransport is false.

Findings.Title: Password policies for IAM users should have strong configurations
Findings.Description: Account password policy does not meet recommended strength (no minimum length, no symbol requirement).

Recommendation.Text: Configure the IAM account password policy to require at least 14 characters, one uppercase, one number, and one symbol.

Findings.Title: Default security group allows inbound traffic from 0.0.0.0/0
Findings.Description: The default security group for VPC vpc-0abc123 allows unrestricted inbound traffic from the internet.

Recommendation.Text: Remove all inbound and outbound rules from the default security group. Use purpose-built security groups instead.
